source_pr.title: *: fix in-compatible behavior when modify value from Navicat GUI
source_pr.body:
This commit fix 2 things which will affect modify values from Navicat GUI,
and remove comparison of FieldType.Flag when mergeFiledType for Union. :

1. add syntax support for `Group_concat( order by) `
Before this commit:
``` sql
tidb(127.0.0.1)> SELECT student_name, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT test_score ORDER BY test_score DESC SEPARATOR ' ') FROM
 student GROUP BY student_name;
ERROR 1105 (HY000): line 1 column 59 near " BY test_score DESC SEPARATOR ' ') FROM student GROUP BY student_name" (
total length 128)
```
2. fix the type infer of `numeric type` columns
Before this commit:
``` sql
create table t1(a int, b decimal(15,2));
select * from t1;
```
``` sql
MySQL:

Field   1:  `a`
Catalog:    `def`
Database:   `test`
Table:      `t1`
Org_table:  `t1`
Type:       LONG
Collation:  binary (63)
Length:     11
Max_length: 0
Decimals:   0
Flags:      NUM       <== No BinaryFlag

Field   2:  `b`
Catalog:    `def`
Database:   `test`
Table:      `t1`
Org_table:  `t1`
Type:       NEWDECIMAL
Collation:  binary (63)
Length:     17
Max_length: 0
Decimals:   2
Flags:      NUM       <== No BinaryFlag
```
```
TiDB:

Field   1:  `a`
Catalog:    `def`
Database:   `test`
Table:      `t1`
Org_table:  `t1`
Type:       LONG
Collation:  binary (63)
Length:     44
Max_length: 0
Decimals:   0
Flags:      BINARY NUM     

Field   2:  `b`
Catalog:    `def`
Database:   `test`
Table:      `t1`
Org_table:  `t1`
Type:       NEWDECIMAL
Collation:  binary (63)
Length:     17
Max_length: 0
Decimals:   2
Flags:      BINARY NUM      
```

symptoms: {`SELECT student_name, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT test_score ORDER BY test_score DESC SEPARATOR ' ') FROM student GROUP BY student_name;`, true}, (parser/parser_test.go)
failure_signature: {`SELECT student_name, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT test_score ORDER BY test_score DESC SEPARATOR ' ') FROM student GROUP BY student_name;`, true}, (parser/parser_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is about SQL compatibility/correctness (GROUP_CONCAT ORDER BY syntax, numeric type inference) and does not provide a flaky-test failure signature or a targeted stabilization change. We avoid guessing a nondeterministic-order root cause category.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: {`SELECT student_name, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT test_score ORDER BY test_score DESC SEPARATOR ' ') FROM student GROUP BY student_name;`, true}, (parser/parser_test.go)
